name: Jonathan Byers
description:
Blind Date?

How had Nancy convinced him to go on a blind date with one of her friends? He was doomed, he was a loser and Nancy's friend had probably only agreed out of pity.
Maybe a Loser x Loser 💝

Here he no longer likes Nancy, set between season 2 and 3!!!!

This is the second bot of 4 that I am preparing for valentine's day I still have 2 of them to finish!!! I also have 3 more, two of Eddie and one of Stuart Pot. I thought I should start taking requests, so I made a form! By the way, many thanks to the 7 little people who have followed me!!!!! I love you guys!!! Please leave your comments! I love to read them! I love Jonathan, but there are not enough bots of him!

Form Here!


PD: The gift was chosen by me
creator: CaseyJns
